major_common_issues: completeness: Missing execution detail or contains quality violations (6)
data_integrity: Data integrity checks are weak (4)

reviewer_table.title: Create order succeeds when order date, customer, and one line item are provided
Create order API accepts valid payload with multiple line items and required fields present
reviewer_table.feedback: completeness: Missing execution detail or contains quality violations; security_awareness: Security evidence is limited

reviewer_table.title: Create order UI blocks save when customer is not selected
Create order API rejects request when order date is missing
reviewer_table.feedback: completeness: Missing execution detail or contains quality violations; security_awareness: Security evidence is limited

reviewer_table.title: Create order API rejects request when line items array is empty
reviewer_table.feedback: completeness: Missing execution detail or contains quality violations; security_awareness: Security evidence is limited

reviewer_table.title: Create order database does not persist partial data after required-field validation failure
reviewer_table.feedback: diagnostic_value: Needs stronger diagnostics

reviewer_table.title: Valid product code order line is accepted and order is created
Empty product code is rejected in the order entry form
Unknown product code is rejected on order submission
reviewer_table.feedback: security_awareness: Security evidence is limited

reviewer_table.title: Product code with leading and trailing spaces is rejected
Null product code payload is rejected by the API
reviewer_table.feedback: security_awareness: Security evidence is limited

reviewer_table.title: Security check rejects unauthorized order creation request with invalid product code
reviewer_table.feedback: measurement_clarity: Measurement criteria are vague; environment_readiness: Environment needs are under-specified

reviewer_table.title: Tax calculation remains consistent when the same taxable order is created twice
reviewer_table.feedback: security_awareness: Security evidence is limited

reviewer_table.title: Tax is calculated and stored for taxable order line items on order creation
reviewer_table.feedback: security_awareness: Security evidence is limited

reviewer_table.title: Non-taxable product line item is created with zero tax amount
reviewer_table.feedback: security_awareness: Security evidence is limited

reviewer_table.title: Mixed taxable and non-taxable line items calculate tax only for taxable products
Tax calculation rounds correctly for taxable product with fractional tax amount
reviewer_table.feedback: diagnostic_value: Needs stronger diagnostics

reviewer_table.title: Tax calculation is rejected when taxable product has missing tax jurisdiction data
reviewer_table.feedback: security_awareness: Security evidence is limited

reviewer_table.title: Order creation event is available through the UI after saving a valid order
Order creation publishes event to downstream integration queue after successful API order creation
reviewer_table.feedback: diagnostic_value: Needs stronger diagnostics; security_awareness: Security evidence is limited

reviewer_table.title: Order creation event is not published when order save is rejected by the UI
Order creation event remains available when the order is created with a single-line minimal valid payload
reviewer_table.feedback: security_awareness: Security evidence is limited

reviewer_table.title: Order creation event payload contains transformed order values for downstream consumers
reviewer_table.feedback: data_integrity: Data integrity checks are weak

reviewer_table.title: Order creation event is not duplicated when the same order is submitted once through the API
reviewer_table.feedback: diagnostic_value: Needs stronger diagnostics; security_awareness: Security evidence is limited

reviewer_table.title: Order creation event is queued when downstream integration endpoint is temporarily unavailable
reviewer_table.feedback: data_integrity: Data integrity checks are weak
